title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
summary: Google Cloud presented the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Agent Registry as a platform for building production agents that can access enterprise data systems. The session covered integrating with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, both existing and custom-built, to connect agents with tools and other agents across SaaS and on-premises systems.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session presents the Agent Development Kit (ADK) paired with an Agent Registry for building production agents that reach enterprise data systems. It covers integrating with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, both existing and custom-built, to connect agents with tools and with other agents across SaaS and on-premises systems. The work matters because it addresses orchestrating tools and agents in production rather than in isolated demos. Concepts include agent orchestration, tool filtering, and MCP server integration.
